action.parameter: context.parentArea.room != null && (context.subject.area.room == null || context.subject.area.room.id != context.parentArea.room.id) ? context.parentArea.room.name : context.parentArea.name
context.parentArea.room != null && (context.subject.area.room == null || context.subject.area.room.id != context.parentArea.room.id) ? context.parentArea.room.name : context.parentArea.name
